mainPage.subGreeting: Two 16-year-old programmers from Germany creating games, web apps, and tools to learn new things and share ideas.

discord.head: Our Discord Community
discord.text: Welcome to the official Orosemo Discord, our community hub. Here you can connect with others, get early access to updates, and exchange knowledge with other like-minded people. You'll also find community channels for chatting, collaborating, and showcasing your own creations. Everyone is warmly invited to join the server and engage with the community!

itch.head: Our Itch.io page
itch.text: Here you'll find all our games, plus everything else related to them: asset packs, demos, Game Jam projects (small gamedev competitions (WIP 😅)), and more. Follow us if you want to see everything we'll build in the future!

gamesPage.headline: Our Games
gamesPage.subHeadline: All games we've made so far.

Jolly Jumper.description: A Christmas-themed jump'n'run with the goal to retrieve the presents stolen by the Grinch. Each level is an unforgiving and difficult challenge.

Easter Eggscape.description: An Easter-themed rage platformer in which the player plays as an egg trying to get back into the right nest after being misplaced in a bird's nest.

toolsPage.headline: Our Tools
toolsPage.subHeadline: All tools we've made so far.

QR-Code Generator.description: Create QR-Codes online for free and customize them as you like.

Jam Management Discord Bot.description: Manage Jams (competitions) in your discord servers very easily.

contactsPage.headline: Get in touch
contactsPage.subHeadline: We look forward to your messages

email.head: Email
email.text: Feel free to send us an email, and we'll try to reply as soon as possible.

joko26.head: Hi, we're Joko26 and Hysedux
joko26.overview: We're two **16-year-old** programmers from **Germany** who love coding. We started programming at different ages, exploring various languages, tools, and frameworks. We mostly work on web projects, tools, and [games](https://orosemo.itch.io/) always trying to learn something new and improve along the way. This website is our place to share what we're working on and showcase the work we already did.

hysedux.head: Hi, we're Joko26 and Hysedux
hysedux.overview: We're two **16-year-old** pixel art artists and programmers from **Germany** who love pixel art. We recently started programming and mainly work on pixel art in [Asesprite](https://www.aseprite.org/) and develop games in [Godot](https://godotengine.org/). Our goal is to become good programmers and create small tools and games that make life easier and better.

aboutPage.transition: Below you can see some of our favorite tools and the technologies we're most comfortable with.
aboutPage.skillsContent: The frameworks/technology we're most familiar with.
aboutPage.toolsContent: The tools we use most frequently.
